query:
$sp-debug 我在会话界面切模型就遇到这个错误提示：Copy
关键是我看到的都是方块啊，而且没法玩 界面屏幕很小看不见
Copy
Error: Failed to switch provider/model: CLI exited during startup with code 143; no CLI stderr/stdout or SDK error payload was captured before exit. Desktop service diagnostics: - sessionId: 61579fa5-e76b-4c3a-a18a-63c0278f9425 - workDir: C:\Users\11034 - runtimeOverride.providerId: f30580fb-6ac6-4f2c-b812-4939f5e87a54 - runtimeOverride.modelId: deepseek-v4-flash - activeProviderId: 138c849c-e579-4736-85e2-728db04e7f13 - configuredProviders: 4 - providerIndex: OpenAI (138c849c-e579-4736-85e2-728db04e7f13), GLM (03d1d26c-ba22-4b99-b982-50e2a73c3c41), DeepSeek (f30580fb-6ac6-4f2c-b812-4939f5e87a54), 小米mimo (7706b74b-04c1-49f6-8c0e-02bf10a3a28a)

aliases: 主要功能开发工作流：sp-specify -> sp-plan -> sp-tasks -> sp-implement，支持分支路径 sp-clarify、sp-deep-research、sp-debug
内联项目认知更新：所有工作流技能都遵循共享的内联关闭合同，在更改项目相关文件或行为后运行内联项目认知更新
工作流技能支持多种执行模式：subagent-mandatory、subagents-first、adaptive、subagent-assisted，并包含 Codex 原生子代理集成
工作流技能集成了项目认知运行时，支持 lexicon 和 query 命令进行语义搜索和上下文感知
工作流状态管理：使用 workflow-state.md 作为阶段状态真理源，支持 compaction 后恢复
所有 sp-* 工作流技能遵循统一的调用语法：$sp-plan 风格语法，并保留规范的工作流状态标识符
所有工作流技能都要求 spec-kit 项目结构，兼容性检查为 'Requires spec-kit project structure with .specify/ directory'
被动学习层集成：所有工作流技能都支持通过 uvx 命令启动学习、捕获和晋升，维护 .specify/memory/learnings/ 目录
项目认知系统采用三层架构：sp-map-scan（证据收集）-> sp-map-build（图重建）-> sp-map-update（增量更新）
高级后果分析门控：所有工作流技能都包含 Senior Consequence Analysis Gate，用于生命周期、运行状态、破坏性行为、共享状态、下游消费者影响分析

aliases: Development velocity is exceptionally high: 838 commits in April-May 2026 combined (avg ~14 commits/day). This suggests rapid prototyping and iterative development. The commit message quality evolved from vague Chinese descriptions to more structured conventional commits over time, indicating growing development discipline.

Four distinct development phases visible in commit history: (1) Source import and documentation (late Mar 2026), (2) Core feature development - model support, commands, docs (early Apr 2026), (3) Desktop app and advanced features - Tauri shell, goal system, agent teams, plugins (Apr-May 2026), (4) Spec Kit Plus integration - .specify/ scaffolding, project cognition, skill system, workflow authoring (late May-Jun 2026). Each phase built upon the previous, showing organic architectural growth.

Rapid fork-to-product evolution: Project started as a source code import from a leaked archive on 2026-03-31 and within 2 months accumulated 843 commits, transforming into an actively developed desktop AI assistant application with Tauri-based desktop shell, goal system, agent teams, plugin architecture, and Spec Kit Plus integration.

concept_candidates.title: Project Evolution Timeline

aliases: Commit convention: Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, refactor:, test:, chore:, perf:, ci:). Branch naming: fix/xxx, feat/xxx, docs/xxx - no codex/ prefix allowed.

Dual AI instruction system: AGENTS.md for general repository guidelines + CLAUDE.md for Claude-specific workflow rules including Spec Kit Plus managed blocks, sp-* workflow routing, project cognition always-on context, and durable state management.

alias_catalog.title: Coverage paths not in existing nodes

aliases: Development velocity is exceptionally high: 838 commits in April-May 2026 combined (avg ~14 commits/day). This suggests rapid prototyping and iterative development. The commit message quality evolved from vague Chinese descriptions to more structured conventional commits over time, indicating growing development discipline.

Four distinct development phases visible in commit history: (1) Source import and documentation (late Mar 2026), (2) Core feature development - model support, commands, docs (early Apr 2026), (3) Desktop app and advanced features - Tauri shell, goal system, agent teams, plugins (Apr-May 2026), (4) Spec Kit Plus integration - .specify/ scaffolding, project cognition, skill system, workflow authoring (late May-Jun 2026). Each phase built upon the previous, showing organic architectural growth.

Rapid fork-to-product evolution: Project started as a source code import from a leaked archive on 2026-03-31 and within 2 months accumulated 843 commits, transforming into an actively developed desktop AI assistant application with Tauri-based desktop shell, goal system, agent teams, plugin architecture, and Spec Kit Plus integration.
evidence_summary_tags: Development velocity is exceptionally high: 838 commits in April-May 2026 combined (avg ~14 commits/day). This suggests rapid prototyping and iterative development. The commit message quality evolved from vague Chinese descriptions to more structured conventional commits over time, indicating growing development discipline.

Four distinct development phases visible in commit history: (1) Source import and documentation (late Mar 2026), (2) Core feature development - model support, commands, docs (early Apr 2026), (3) Desktop app and advanced features - Tauri shell, goal system, agent teams, plugins (Apr-May 2026), (4) Spec Kit Plus integration - .specify/ scaffolding, project cognition, skill system, workflow authoring (late May-Jun 2026). Each phase built upon the previous, showing organic architectural growth.

Rapid fork-to-product evolution: Project started as a source code import from a leaked archive on 2026-03-31 and within 2 months accumulated 843 commits, transforming into an actively developed desktop AI assistant application with Tauri-based desktop shell, goal system, agent teams, plugin architecture, and Spec Kit Plus integration.
alias_catalog.title: Project Evolution Timeline

aliases: Single-primary-author project: 程序员阿江(Relakkes) authored ~87% of all commits. This is a solo-maintainer project with occasional community PRs. The contributor uses multiple name variants (Relakkes Yang, 程序员阿江-Relakkes), likely across different machines or accounts. This concentration creates both velocity and bus-factor risk.

Upstream sync pattern: The project is a fork that periodically syncs with upstream (cc-haha repository). Merge commits like 'Merge upstream/main: 同步上游最新代码' and 'Merge branch main of https://github.com/chenziyang110/cc-haha' show active upstream tracking. This means the project inherits upstream improvements while adding local customizations.

alias_catalog.title: Contributor Patterns

aliases: Sequential numbered feature branches (006, 007, 008) indicate a disciplined feature-workflow approach where each major initiative gets its own branch. Current branch '008-specify-discussions-settings' focuses on Spec Kit Plus discussion and settings features. This pattern suggests the project uses a lightweight variant of trunk-based development with numbered feature lanes.
